title: Nomenclature Comparison Workflow
description: This pipeline uses Nextflow to generate and compare c. and p. nomenclature from multiple sources

enable_snpeff.description: Allows disabling SnpEff. We are considering removing SnpEff, turning it off is the first step.

variant_transcript_filter.description: CSV with list of variant and transcript to filter on

cgd_export_df.description: Nomenclature exported from CGD and saved as parquet (See variant_nomenclature_db.py)

preferred_transcripts.description: List of transcript accessions we are interested in. Unlike variant_transcript_filter, this list does not limit output it just adds an is_preferred field to the comparison df.

ncbi_refseq_gff_db.description: NCBI RefSeq genome annotation in db format (See gffutils_helper.py createDb)

mutalyzer_nomenclature_file.description: Nomenclature generated by Mutalyzer (csv). Generated by mutalyzer_nomenclature.py but not part of workflow because it takes so long.

generate_variant_validator_batch.description: After comparing nomenclature generate a submission batch file for Variant Validator

uta_schema.description: UTA database scheme used when querying for gap variants

variant_source.description: Source for variants that will be processed
